parsed.production_notes: The video features a human presenter in the bottom panel and an AI-generated 3D animated character in the top panel. The AI character has a stylized, Pixar-like appearance.

characters.appearance: 3D animated male character, young adult, medium build, fair complexion, curly dark hair, wearing glasses. Stylized, cartoonish features.
characters.wardrobe: Purple and white floral Hawaiian shirt.

characters.appearance: Human male, young adult, medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, dark beard and mustache.
characters.demeanor: Focused, slightly hesitant when speaking Japanese, then relieved and happy.

scenes.setting: Top panel: dimly lit room with a warm lamp in the background. Bottom panel: room with purple ambient lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is shown from the chest up, resting his chin on his hand. He looks directly at the camera with a friendly expression. The background is dark with a soft, warm light source on the right.

Character B is shown from the chest up, wearing headphones. He looks directly at the camera, his expression changing from focused to slightly confused, then to smiling. The background is a solid, vibrant purple.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with an animated character on top and a human on the bottom. They are engaged in a conversation. Subtitles appear in the middle of the screen, translating the Japanese dialogue into English.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: にほんごきらい。 [Nihongo kirai. / I hate Japanese.]
Character A says: おなまえはなんですか？ [Onamae wa nan desu ka? / What's your name?]
Character B says: わたしのなまえはグスタボです。 [Watashi no namae wa Gustavo desu. / My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: おげんきですか？ [Ogenki desu ka? / How are you?]
Character B says: げんきです。 [Genki desu. / I'm fine.]
Character A says: にほんごをはなせますか？ [Nihongo o hanasemasu ka? / Do you speak Japanese?]
Character B says: はい、わたし… [Hai, watashi... / Yes, I...]
Character A says: はい、はなせます。 [Hai, hanasemasu. / Do you mean: Hai, hanasemasu. / Yes, I speak it.]
Character B says: はい、はなせます。 [Hai, hanasemasu. / Yes, I speak it.]
Character A says: なんさいですか？ [Nan-sai desu ka? / How old are you?]
Character B says: わたし… にじゅうよん…？ [Watashi... nijuyon...? / I... twenty-four...?]
Character A says: にじゅうよんさいです。 [Nijuyon-sai desu. / Do you mean: Nijuyon-sai desu. / I am 24.]
Character B says: にじゅうよんさいです。 [Nijuyon-sai desu. / I am 24.]
Character B says: How can I practice my Japanese every day?
Character A says: Just download Praktika.
Character B says: I'll download Praktika right now.

scenes.visual_description: The screen displays the Praktika app logo and name in the center. Below it are the 'Download on the App Store' and 'GET IT ON Google Play' buttons.
